CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This formula shows the Gross Amount Due to Seller minus the Contract Sale Price. Should equal the sum of lines 402-412 on the HUD-1 (any amounts due to seller beyond the Contract Sales Price).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula shows the Gross Amount Due to Seller minus the Contract Sale Price. Should equal the sum of lines 402-412 on the HUD-1 (any amounts due to seller beyond the Contract Sales Price).
CustomField.label: Other Amounts Due to Seller
